description: CSS transforms (rotate, scale, translate, combined) and box-shadow (sm, md, lg, inset, multi-layer, colored)
visual_assertions: The rotate-15 box should appear rotated 15 degrees clockwise
The rotate-45 box should appear rotated 45 degrees, looking like a diamond
The rotate-90 box should appear rotated 90 degrees
The rotate-neg box should appear rotated 30 degrees counter-clockwise
The scale-up box should appear 30% larger than the base size
The scale-down box should appear 30% smaller than the base size
The translate-right box should appear shifted 40px to the right
The translate-down box should appear shifted 20px downward
The combined transform box should show all three transformations applied simultaneously
Shadow boxes should show drop shadows of varying size and intensity below/around them
